title: 'Big Short' investor Michael Burry warns stocks are long overdue for a crash — and 'fragile' markets could worsen it
description: Michael Burry of "The Big Short" fame expects stock-market crashes to become more severe and last longer thanks to a cocktail of market trends.

title: February hedge fund returns: Citadel, ExodusPoint churn out gains for the month
description: Sophisticated money managers were mostly up in February despite the market being down.

title: Trump's pledge to keep oil flowing has calmed markets, but Wall Street experts say disruption risks aren't over
description: Trump offered assurances that the US will protect the flow of oil in the Middle East during the war in Iran, but experts are still worried about disruptions.

title: I spent the day at an iconic Wall Street steakhouse in search of the power lunch — but I was looking in the wrong place
description: Delmonico's said that lunch isn't what it used to be, since companies are replacing restaurants as the go-to lunch spot.

title: Target finished out a difficult year with declining sales, but says growth is ahead
description: Target reported a 1.7% decline in total sales for its fiscal year, but said it expects net sales growth in every quarter of 2026.

title: Meta is forming a new AI engineering org for its superintelligence push, with teams as large as 50 people per manager
description: Meta's applied AI engineering team, headed by VP Maher Saba, partners with Superintelligence Labs and uses a flat organizational model.

title: The government's AI standoff could decide who really controls America's military tech
description: The dispute between the Department of Defense, Anthropic, and OpenAI has sparked a broader debate over who sets the terms for how AI systems are used.

title: These eye-popping charts put OpenAI's record funding round in perspective

title: Jobs report updates: What to expect after last month's surprisingly robust job surge
description: The Bureau of Labor Statistics will release its jobs report revealing February's job growth, after a job surge the prior month that beat expectations.

title: Everything you want to know about the drama in private credit but were too afraid to ask
description: Private credit is facing increased scrutiny. But what even is private credit? Why are people nervous? And, most importantly, why should you care?
